sources.usedByProductionRoutes: Dev-only when DB empty: `listStaticBlogPostsForIndex` + `getBlogPostMetaBySlug` via `canUseStaticBlogFallback()`. `/blog/[slug]` body uses `getPublishedBlogPostBySlug` → Prisma only — static HTML is NOT merged into the page component.
sources.notes: Three curated posts with full bodyHtml; production visibility still requires matching BlogPost rows if DB is populated.

sources.usedByProductionRoutes: Same as blog-static-posts.ts (helper for static array).

sources.notes: Authoritative published content for `/blog/[slug]` when `getPublishedBlogPostBySlug` returns a row. Static fallback does not supply body to page.
Separate model from BlogPost; full body in DB localizedBody.
